exploration_notes:
The async runtime waker mechanism in rust-lang/rust's standard library spans 4 key files:

1. **`library/core/src/task/wake.rs`** — The central file. Defines `RawWaker` (data pointer + vtable reference), `RawWakerVTable` (the virtual function pointer table with clone/wake/wake_by_ref/drop), `Waker` (the safe wrapper that calls through the vtable), `LocalWaker` (non-Send variant), `Context` (carries the Waker into poll), and `ContextBuilder`.
